mnemonics: MOTHER - Map, Operate, Handle, Execute, Transfer
SERVLET - Serve, Respond, Handle, Execute, Transfer, Load
keyPoints: A servlet is a Java class that extends the HttpServlet class
The servlet life cycle consists of initialization, service, and destruction phases
The HTTP servlet API provides methods for handling HTTP requests and responses
Tomcat is a popular Java-based web server used for servlet development
Servlets can be used to create dynamic web applications
